subject: [PATCH 5/8 RFC] mm/memcontrol: convert memcg to use page_counter_stock

2026-04-10.patch_summary: This patch converts the memory control group (memcg) to use page_counter_stock instead of replicating its own stock handling logic. This change removes special casing for avoiding refilling and flushing of other memcgs' stocks, folds stock checking into the memory page counter, and allows for failing during page_counter_enable_stock() if there is not enough memory to allocate a percpu page_counter_stock.
